title: Opening for Production Engineer at MRF

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at MRF
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
